memoryArtifacts.headline: Sylvanus Hartwell Covey and wife Carrie Find a Grave photo by Fred
memoryArtifacts.description:
Birth: 	Jun. 18, 1858
Decatur
Otsego County
New York, USA
Death: 	Jan. 5, 1939
White Salmon
Klickitat County
Washington, USA

Father: Slyvanus Covey
Mother: Sarah (Fowler) Covey

Wife: Carrie A. Covey
Son: Ernest Covey
Daughters: Ruth White and 
Leona Breedlove

He was 80 years old at the time of his death.
Information from Washington State Digital Archives website. 
 
Family links: 
 Parents:
  Sylvanus Covey (1818 - 1911)
  Sarah Fowler Covey (1822 - 1888)
 
 Spouses:
  Carrie A. Utter Covey (1853 - 1948)*
  Jane Elizabeth Wickham Covey (1859 - 1886)*
 
 Children:
  Hartwell L. Covey (1880 - 1881)*
  Leona Delilah Covey Breedlove (1888 - 1957)*
  Ruth M. Covey White (1901 - 1994)*
 
 Siblings:
  Cyrenus P. Covey (1849 - 1873)*
  Irene Covey Southard (1851 - 1936)*
  Lorraine Covey Turner (1856 - 1934)*
  Sylvanus Hartwell Covey (1858 - 1939)
 
*Calculated relationship
 
Inscription:
Shares headstone with Carrie A. Covey.
 
Burial:
West Klickitat District 01 Cemetery 
White Salmon
Klickitat County
Washington, USA
 
Edit Virtual Cemetery info [?]
 
Created by: Fred
Record added: Apr 19, 2009 
Find A Grave Memorial# 36064605

zh.lifeSummary: 當Carrie A Utter於1853年出生在美國紐約州奧瑟格伍斯特時，她的父親Lewis Utter38歲，母親Delilah Day32歲。她於1886年與Silvanus Hartwell Covey結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她在美國紐約州奧瑟格德卡度住了大約50年。她去世於1948年6月2日在美國華盛頓州可利吉塔特懷特 賽門享年95歲，埋葬在美國華盛頓州可利吉塔特懷特 賽門。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Carrie A Utter于1853年出生在美国纽约州奧瑟格伍斯特时，她的父亲Lewis Utter38岁，母亲Delilah Day32岁。她于1886年与Silvanus Hartwell Covey结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她在美国纽约州奧瑟格德卡度住了大约50年。她去世于1948年6月2日在美国华盛顿州可利吉塔特懷特 賽門享年95岁，埋葬在美国华盛顿州可利吉塔特懷特 賽門。

nameMeanings.name: Carrie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Caroline or occasionally of other girls' names beginning with the syllable Car-, now often bestowed as a name in its own right.

historicEvents.description: Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The Battle at Gettysburg
historicEvents.description: The Battle of Gettysburg involved the largest number of casualties of the entire Civil war and is often described as the war's turning point. Between 46,000 and 51,000 soldiers lost their lives during the three-day Battle. To honor the fallen soldiers, President Abraham Lincoln read his historic Gettysburg Address and helped those listening by redefining the purpose of the war.

historicEvents.title: The Assassination of James Garfield
historicEvents.description: Garfield was shot twice by Charles J. Guitea at Railroad Station in Washington, D.C. on July 2, 1881. After eleven weeks of intensive and other care Garfield died in Elberon, New Jersey, the second of four presidents to be assassinated, following Abraham Lincoln.

historicEvents.title: Washington Becomes a State
historicEvents.description: On November 11, 1889, Washington Territory became Washington State the 42nd state to enter the Union. The state was named in honor of George Washington.

historicEvents.title: So Much Farm Land
historicEvents.description: A law that funded many irrigation and agricultural projects in the western states.

historicEvents.title: Pike's Market
historicEvents.description: Pike’s Market is one of the oldest still working farmer’s markets in the US. It is located in Seattle’s central business district, just north of Belltown , and southwest of central waterfront and Elliott Bay. One of the attractions there is the gum wall.
Charles Lindbergh makes the first solo nonstop transatlantic flight in his plane The Spirit of St. Louis.

Galloping Gertie is the reference used to describe the Tacoma Narrows Bridge. It opened on July 1, 1940 four months later it no longer existed. On November 7, 1940 the wind gusts came up to 40 miles an hour causing the bridge to twist and vibrate violently before it collapsed into Puget Sound. The only victim of the bridge collapsing was a three-legged paralyzed dog named Tubby whose owner tried to rescue him from the car but he wouldn’t go with him.

en.lifeSummary: When Carrie A Utter was born in 1853, in Worcester, Otsego, New York, United States, her father, Lewis Utter, was 38 and her mother, Delilah Day, was 32. She married Silvanus Hartwell Covey in 1886. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She lived in Decatur, Otsego, New York, United States for about 50 years. She died on 2 June 1948, in White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, United States, at the age of 95, and was buried in White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Carrie A Utter est née en 1853, à Worcester, Otsego, New York, États-Unis, son père, Lewis Utter, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Delilah Day, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Silvanus Hartwell Covey en 1886. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle a vécu à Decatur, Otsego, New York, États-Unis pendant environ 50 ans. Elle est décédée le 2 juin 1948, à White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, États-Unis, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Carrie A Utter 1853 in Worcester, Otsego, New York, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lewis Utter 38 und ihre Mutter Delilah Day 32. Sie hat 1886 Silvanus Hartwell Covey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie hat ungefähr 50 Jahre lang in Decatur, Otsego, New York, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 2. Juni 1948 im Alter von 95 Jahren in White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Carrie A Utter è nata il nel 1853 nel Worcester, Otsego, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Lewis Utter, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Delilah Day, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Silvanus Hartwell Covey nel 1886. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Decatur, Otsego, New York, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 50 anni. Morì il 2 giugno 1948, nel White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolta a White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Uni: アメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クリクイタトウィト サルモン
ja.White Salmon, , Washington: アメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クリクイタトウィト サルモン
ja.lifeSummary: Carrie A Utterが1853年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州オトセゴウオルセスターで生まれた時，父Lewis Utterは38歳，母Delilah Dayは32歳であった。1886年にSilvanus Hartwell Coveyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州オトセゴデカトゥルに約50年間住んでいた。彼女は1948年6月2日にアメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クリクイタトウィト サルモンで95歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クリクイタトウィト サルモンにて埋葬された。

ko.White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Uni: 미국 워싱턴 주 클릭이타트 휘트 살몬
ko.White Salmon, , Washington: 미국 워싱턴 주 클릭이타트 휘트 살몬
ko.lifeSummary: Carrie A Utter(이)가 1853년 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 워스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lewis Utter(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Delilah Day(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1886년 Silvanus Hartwell Covey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 데카투르에서 약 50년 동안 살았다. 그녀는 1948년 6월 2일 미국 워싱턴 주 클릭이타트 휘트 살몬에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 워싱턴 주 클릭이타트 휘트 살몬에 묻혔다.

pt.Otsego, Otsego, New York, United States: Otsego, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Carrie A Utter nasceu em 1853, em Worcester, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Lewis Utter, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Delilah Day, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Silvanus Hartwell Covey em 1886. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela viveu em Decatur, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América por quase 50 anos. Ela faleceu em 2 de junho de 1948, em White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Estados Unidos da América, com 95 anos, e foi sepultada em White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Uni: уит салмон, кликкитат, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты
ru.White Salmon, , Washington: уит салмон, кликкитат, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Carrie A Utter родилась в 1853 г. в местности ворсестир, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Lewis Utter было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Delilah Day, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Silvanus Hartwell Covey в 1886 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности декатур, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты около 50 лет. Она умерла 2 июня 1948 г. в местности уит салмон, кликкитат, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности уит салмон, кликкитат, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Carrie A Utter nació en 1853, en Worcester, Otsego, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, Lewis Utter, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Delilah Day, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Silvanus Hartwell Covey en 1886. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Vivió en Decatur, Otsego, Nueva York, Estados Unidos durante unos 50 años. Murió el 2 de junio de 1948, en White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultada en White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Estados Unidos.
